Serial Port Path: Путь к последовательному порту (например, COM3 или /dev/ttyUSB0)
Manual Serial Port Path (e.g. COM3 or /d: Путь к последовательному порту (например, COM3 или /dev/ttyUSB0)
Specify the connection path to your Beck: Укажите путь подключения к вашему USB-накопителю Becker Centronic.
Manual Path Entry (e.g. for offline adap: Manual Path Entry (e.g. for offline adapter or initial installation)
Generate Random Unit Code (Copy and past: Generate Random Unit Code (Copy and paste into table)
Each row in the table represents a virtu: Each row in the table represents a virtual remote control. Only one unique Unit Code (5 hex characters) must be used per remote control. This code is required to pair the virtual remote with the roller shutter motor.
